final:
module up_down_counter(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input up_down,
    
    output reg [3:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        if (up_down) begin
            q <= q + 1;
        end else begin
            q <= q - 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
